key.name: trigger-shortcut
key.summary: Main keyboard shortcut to trigger extension
key.description: The main keyboard shortcut that will trigger the extension functionality

key.name: app-configs
key.description: JSON object of configured applications with their settings (app_id, name, workspace, shortcut, icon, verified)

key.name: app-shortcuts
key.description: JSON object mapping application IDs to their keyboard shortcuts

key.name: app-shortcut-mailspring
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to activate mailspring

key.name: app-shortcut-beeper
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to activate beeper

key.name: app-shortcut-clickup
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to activate clickup

key.name: app-shortcut-slack
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to activate slack

key.name: app-shortcut-legcord
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to activate legcord

key.name: app-shortcut-notion-electron
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to activate notion-electron

key.name: app-shortcut-zen
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to activate zen

key.name: app-shortcut-spotify
key.description: Keyboard shortcut to activate spotify

key.name: available-workspaces
key.description: List of workspace numbers that can be assigned to applications

key.name: show-notifications
key.description: Whether to show desktop notifications when activating applications

key.name: debug-logging
key.description: Whether to enable debug logging to the system journal

key.name: launch-if-not-running
key.description: Whether to launch an application if it's not currently running when activated

key.name: move-to-workspace
key.description: Whether to move the application to its configured workspace when activated

key.name: focus-on-activate
key.description: Whether to focus the application window when activated

key.name: switch-to-workspace
key.description: Whether to switch to the application's workspace when activated

key.name: multi-window-behavior
key.description: How to handle applications with multiple windows: focus-any, focus-recent, or cycle-windows

key.name: notification-timeout
key.description: How long to show desktop notifications in seconds

key.name: allow-shortcut-conflicts
key.description: Whether to allow multiple applications to have the same keyboard shortcut

key.name: app-cache-expiry
key.description: How many hours to cache discovered applications before refreshing
